title: LanguageDetection probe output
description: Slice of repo-context produced by the LanguageDetection probe (Layer A, S4-01). Wrapped under `language_stack` to match localv2 §5.1 A1 and the arch §Gap 4 prelude-pass shape; primary may be null for an empty repo. Strict at the slice — sets the precedent Phase 1 probes inherit (ADR-0013).

counts.description: Map of language name (lowercased) to file count detected by the probe.

primary.description: The language with the highest count (ties broken by alphabetical order); null when no files were detected.
